overview: The fully electronic Anesthesia Workstation offers an ergonomic Design and a maximum in Performance and Safety for all Patient Categories
features: 15.6” TFT touch screen display, integrated patient monitor as option.
User friendly interface design and easy to operate.
Full-electronic flowmeter with precise control and accurate data monitoring.
All ventilation modes to suit pediatric and adult patients
Highly integrated breathing circuit with built-in heater
